title: teucrium bracteatum var. riatarum
intro: Teucrium bracteatum var. riatarum, also known as Riatarum Teucrium, is a lesser-known variety of the Teucrium bracteatum plant, a type of flowering shrub native to New South Wales, Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like caffeic acid, quercetin, and rosmarinic acid, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Teucrium bracteatum var. riatarum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils, and are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
